issues.title: Duplicate recipients
issues.description: The batch includes duplicate recipient addresses.
issues.recommendation: Deduplicate the batch list and recalculate totals.

issues.title: Invalid address
issues.description: At least one address is malformed.
issues.recommendation: Fix invalid addresses before making any onchain call.

issues.title: Batch exceeds wallet balance
issues.description: The batch total appears greater than the available wallet balance.
issues.recommendation: Reduce the batch or fund the wallet before submitting.
